data.title: Bitcoin SuperTrend Signal That Preceded Last 60% Correction Resurfaces
data.description:
Over the past week, the Bitcoin price kept on putting in consecutive lows, with barely any hopes in sight for a bullish reversal. However, on Friday, February 13th, the flagship cryptocurrency saw an upward momentum boost, where its value subsequently grew by 5. 4%. While this may have been good for short-term traders (specifically scalpers), a troubling future seems to be lying in wait for the premier cryptocurrency
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin/bitcoin-supertrend-signal-that-preceded-correction/

data.title: Jake Paul's Anti Fund Expands to Institutional Level with $65 Million in Assets
data.description: Jake Paul's venture capital fund, Anti Fund, has expanded its operations to manage over $65 million in assets, transitioning into an institutional company. According to NS3.AI, the fund has made significant investments in prominent tech projects such as OpenAI, Polymarket, Anduril, and Ramp. Additionally, Jake Paul has entered into a licensing agreement with OpenAI's text-to-video platform, Sora, while utilizing social media marketing strategies to support portfolio companies.

data.title: Niger to Return Uranium Stockpile to French Nuclear Firm
data.description: Niger has announced its readiness to return the uranium produced by Orano SA at the Somair mine to the French nuclear company. Bloomberg posted on X that this decision comes two months after unidentified attackers staged an assault on the capital, posing a threat to the uranium stockpile. The move is seen as a step towards stabilizing the situation following the security breach. The uranium, crucial for nuclear energy production, is a significant resource for Orano SA, which operates in Niger. The return of the stockpile is expected to restore normal operations and strengthen the relationship between Niger and the French company.

data.title: Vitalik Buterin: Predicting the market should shift towards risk hedging rather than short-term speculation
data.description: Vitalik Buterin, in a post on social media platform X, stated that current prediction markets are overly focused on short-term crypto prices and high-dopamine products like sports betting, lacking long-term social information value and potentially creating an unhealthy product-market match. He proposed that prediction markets should be driven towards "risk hedging," becoming tools for reducing asset or real-world spending risks. Buterin also envisioned building a stable mechanism to replace fiat currency through personalized prediction market share based on price indices, thereby providing users with more sustainable value hedging solutions. He called for building a new generation of financial systems, rather than simply relying on speculative flows.

data.title: Federal Decision Keeps Michigan Coal Plant Operational
data.description: A coal plant in Michigan, J.H. Campbell, was initially scheduled for closure. Bloomberg posted on X that the federal government has decided to keep the plant operational. This decision comes amid ongoing discussions about energy policies and environmental impacts. The plant's continued operation highlights the complexities of balancing energy needs with environmental concerns.

data.title: He Yi responds to user blocking controversy: VPN involved, triggering risk control, account switched to cash withdrawal mode
data.description: Regarding user reports of account suspensions, Binance co-founder He Yi stated on the X social media platform that the situation may be due to using a VPN to connect to countries or regions where Binance does not provide services. The system has switched the account to "withdrawal-only mode," and users need to contact customer support for assistance. Previously, some users reported experiencing account restrictions or asset freezes on Binance and other exchanges. Binance emphasized that it is continuously increasing its investment in compliance and implementing risk control measures in accordance with regulatory requirements.

data.title: Angola's Offshore Discovery Could Boost Oil Production
data.description: Azule Energy, a joint venture between Eni and BP, along with its partners, has discovered an offshore well that may contain up to 500 million barrels of crude oil. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the potential impact of this discovery on Angola's oil production. This find could significantly aid Angola in addressing its declining oil output, offering a promising development for the country's energy sector.

data.title: AI Breakthrough Uncovers Dozens of New High-Temperature Magnets
data.description:
Researchers used AI to identify over 67,000 magnetic materials, including 25 new high-temperature compounds that could cut reliance on rare earth elements.
source: https://catenaa.com/industries/technology/ai-breakthrough-uncovers-dozens-of-new-high-temperature-magnets/

data.title: Trader Increases Ethereum Position with High Leverage
data.description: The trader known as Machi Big Brother has recently expanded their long position in Ethereum, now holding 2,700 ETH with 25x leverage. According to NS3.AI, this position is currently yielding a floating profit of approximately $150,000. This strategic move indicates sustained confidence in the short-term price appreciation of Ethereum.

data.title: U.S. Urges Cuba to Grant Political and Economic Freedoms
data.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio emphasized that Cuba's Communist government must provide political and economic freedoms to its citizens for the United States to consider easing its pressure on the island. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that recent U.S. actions have contributed to blackouts and disruptions in daily life in Cuba. Rubio's statement underscores the ongoing diplomatic tensions between the two nations, as the U.S. continues to advocate for reforms in Cuba. The call for change comes amid a backdrop of economic challenges and social unrest on the island, with the U.S. maintaining its stance on promoting democratic values and human rights.

data.title: Jake Paul's fund, which holds $65 million in assets, has invested in OpenAI and Polymarket.
data.description: Jake Paul announced on the X platform that his venture capital fund, Anti Fund, co-founded with Geoffrey Woo, now manages over $65 million in assets. The fund has transitioned from an initial rolling fund to an institutional firm and has successfully secured investments from well-known projects such as OpenAI, Anduril, Polymarket, and Ramp. Paul stated that he became the first celebrity to reach a licensing agreement with OpenAI's text-to-video platform, Sora, granting them rights to his name, image, and likeness. Anti Fund partner Steve Han stated that the fund leverages its marketing and distribution capabilities on social media to support tech startups. Previously, Paul had reached a settlement with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) regarding allegations of illegally promoting a crypto scheme. (fortune)

data.title: Ethereum Price Jumps 4%, but Daily Chart Still Signals Fragile Recovery
data.description:
The Ethereum price’s 4% rally shows early signs of stabilization, but the daily chart still reflects a fragile structure that could still go either way.

The post Ethereum Price Jumps 4%, but Daily Chart Still Signals Fragile Recovery first appeared on Ecoinimist.

data.title: Southeast Asian gangs’ crypto flows hit $260M
data.description:
Southeast Asian gangs involved in human trafficking have now kicked up their money laundering activities, relying on cryptocurrencies to move illegal funds and conceal profits. The move signals a shift in how these groups operate across borders, with a new report showing that digital assets have become the most preferred channel. According to the report, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/southeast-asian-gangs-crypto-flows-hit-260m/

data.title: Ripple Bulls Reveal Bold Price Predictions as XRP Surges to Weekly Highs
data.description:
XRP's price jumped by over 7% in the past day and neared $1. 50 for the first time in a week.
source: https://cryptopotato.com/ripple-bulls-reveal-bold-price-predictions-as-xrp-surges-to-weekly-highs/

data.title: Bitcoin Rebounds to $70,000 Amid Cooling Inflation Signs
data.description: Bitcoin's price has recovered to $70,000 after a significant market loss of $8.7 billion. According to NS3.AI, this rebound comes as inflation shows signs of cooling. Despite the price recovery, market sentiment remains cautious, with the Crypto Fear & Greed Index still indicating 'extreme fear.' This suggests that investors continue to be concerned about the underlying market conditions.

data.title: Brother Machi added to his long ETH position and is currently showing a floating profit of $150,000.
data.description: According to HyperInsight monitoring, Huang Licheng's address, known as "Maji Dage," added to its ETH long position 10 minutes ago. Currently, it has a floating profit of $150,000 on 2,700 ETH with 25x leverage.

data.title: XRP Faces 60% Decline Amid Investor Panic and Market Uncertainty
data.description: XRP has seen significant losses, with panic selling driving long-term holders to exit at unprecedented rates, resulting in a 60% drop from its peak. According to NS3.AI, despite positive developments such as regulatory clarity, ETF approvals, and adoption by major firms, XRP's price remains weak at approximately $1.41, raising uncertainty about its future. Analysts suggest the current selloff might represent a capitulation phase, yet investor sentiment remains cautious amid ongoing market underperformance.

data.title: GEOPOLITICS | Zelensky Stresses Importance of EU Membership Date for Ukraine
data.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky emphasized the critical importance of setting a date for Ukraine's accession to the European Union. According to Jin10, Zelensky warned that without a clear timeline, Russian President Vladimir Putin might exert significant efforts to obstruct Ukraine's EU membership process after the war. Zelensky's remarks highlight the geopolitical tensions surrounding Ukraine's aspirations to join the EU and the potential challenges posed by Russia in the post-conflict period.

data.title: XRP ETFs See Lowest Weekly Inflow Since Launch
data.description:
XRP ETFs have seen weak performances over the past week, hence, they have closed the week with a pretty poor record of inflows, as only $7. 65 million were seen during the week.
source: https://u.today/xrp-etfs-see-lowest-weekly-inflow-since-launch

Solana Company shares have jumped 14. 51% (+0. 28) as the firm rolls out institutional borrowing against natively staked SOL in qualified custody.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/solana-company-stock-surges-over-14/
